mapper.sql: live_session_id AS liveSessionId, product_id AS productId, live_title AS liveTitle, video_url AS videoUrl, thumbnail_url AS thumbnailUrl, live_message AS liveMessage, cache_version AS cacheVersion, status, started_at AS startedAt

${alias}.live_session_id AS liveSessionId, ${alias}.product_id AS productId, ${alias}.live_title AS liveTitle, ${alias}.video_url AS videoUrl, ${alias}.thumbnail_url AS thumbnailUrl, ${alias}.live_message AS liveMessage, ${alias}.cache_version AS cacheVersion, ${alias}.status, ${alias}.started_at AS startedAt
mapper.select: SELECT FROM live_session ORDER BY started_at DESC, live_session_id DESC
SELECT FROM live_session WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND status = 'ON_AIR' ORDER BY started_at DESC, live_session_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM live_session ls INNER JOIN ( SELECT product_id, MAX(live_session_id) AS live_session_id FROM live_session WHERE status = 'ON_AIR' GROUP BY product_id ) latest ON latest.live_session_id = ls.live_session_id ORDER BY ls.product_id ASC
SELECT DISTINCT product_id FROM live_session WHERE status = 'ON_AIR' ORDER BY product_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO live_session ( product_id, live_title, video_url, thumbnail_url, live_message, cache_version, status, started_at ) VALUES ( #{productId}, #{liveTitle}, #{videoUrl}, #{thumbnailUrl}, #{liveMessage}, #{cacheVersion}, #{status}, #{startedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE live_session SET product_id = #{productId}, live_title = #{liveTitle}, video_url = #{videoUrl}, thumbnail_url = #{thumbnailUrl}, live_message = #{liveMessage}, cache_version = #{cacheVersion}, status = #{status}, started_at = #{startedAt} WHERE live_session_id = #{liveSessionId}
